spec.query:
from(bucket: "q1_results")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "q1_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "dep_delay_mean")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: max, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "dep_delay_mean")

latest_timestamp = from(bucket: "q2_results")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "q2_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "rank")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_size"] == "global")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

target_time = latest_timestamp._time

  from(bucket: "q2_results")
  |>range(start: target_time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "q2_result")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_size"] == "global")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == target_time)
  |> pivot(
       rowKey: ["_time", "airport"],
       columnKey: ["_field"],
       valueColumn: "_value"
     )
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "airport", "rank", "num_flights", "severe_delays", "dep_delay_mean", "dep_delay_max"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"])

spec.title: Top 10 origin airport per severe delays - Global window

spec.query:
latest_timestamp = from(bucket: "q2_results")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "delayed_flights")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_field"] == "dep_delay")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_size"] == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["origin_airport"] == "${airport_1h}")
  |> group()
  |> last()
  |> findRecord(fn: (key) => true, idx: 0)

target_time = latest_timestamp._time

from(bucket: "q2_results")
  |> range(start: target_time)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_measurement"] == "delayed_flights")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["window_size"] == "1")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["origin_airport"] == "${airport_1h}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r["_time"] == target_time)
  |> pivot(
       rowKey: ["_time", "origin_airport", "rank"],
       columnKey: ["_field"],
       valueColumn: "_value"
     )
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["rank", "airline", "dest_airport", "dep_delay"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with rank: int(v: r.rank)}))
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"], desc: false)

spec.title: Top 20 fligths ordered by departure delay
